summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features in FALINTIL-FDTL PMS (Iteration 4). All 13 features tested and verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright automation.

issues: Chart dimension warnings in console (width/height -1) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing test member: Isac Mendes (NIM: 40452411). Backend tests created and cleaned up test members with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 new features verified working: 1) Ano de Incorporação field in form, 2) Status de Escolaridade dropdown, 3) Status de Licença dropdown with 'Em Serviço' default, 4) Conditional promotion fields (Data de Promoção, Posto Promovido) appear only for non-Soldado/Grumete/Soldado Instruendo postos, 5) Dashboard shows 7 Status de Licença cards, 6) Status Licença cards are clickable and navigate to filtered members list, 7) Unidade filter in members page, 8) Ano Incorporação filter in members page, 9) Members list sorted alphabetically (A-Z), 10) Total members count displayed with filters, 11) Activity Logs page accessible for admin only, 12) Logs show Data/Hora, Usuário, Função, Ação, Detalhes, 13) Export CSV button works.

feature_1_ano_incorporacao.verification: Field visible in member form Step 1 under 'Informações Adicionais' section. Input type=number with min=1975 and placeholder 'Ex: 2010'.

feature_2_status_escolaridade.verification: Dropdown visible in member form with options: Doutorado/a, Mestrado/a, Licenciatura, Bacharelato, D3, D1, Secundária, Pré-Secundária, Primária.

feature_3_status_licenca.verification: Dropdown visible with default 'Em Serviço'. Options: Em Serviço, Licença Sem Vencimento, Licença Junta Médica, Licença de Partos, Licença de Estudo, Curso no Exterior, Curso no Interior.

feature_4_conditional_promotion_fields.verification: When posto is Capitão (not in postos_sem_promocao), 'Dados de Promoção' section appears with Data de Promoção and Posto Promovido fields. Logic implemented correctly in frontend.

feature_5_dashboard_status_licenca_cards.verification: Dashboard shows 7 Status de Licença cards: Em Serviço, Lic. Sem Vencimento, Lic. Junta Médica, Lic. de Partos, Lic. de Estudo, Curso Exterior, Curso Interior.

feature_6_clickable_status_licenca_cards.verification: Cards are clickable and navigate to /members?status_licenca={status}. Tested Em Serviço and Licença de Estudo cards.

feature_7_unidade_filter.verification: Filter dropdown present in members page with all unidades including Quartel General.

feature_8_ano_incorporacao_filter.verification: Filter dropdown present in members page. Backend endpoint /api/constants/anos-incorporacao returns existing years from database.

feature_9_alphabetical_sorting.verification: Backend sorts members by nome ascending (A-Z). Verified in test_members_sorted_alphabetically.

feature_10_total_members_count.verification: Members page shows 'Total: X membro(s) encontrado(s)' with current filter count.

feature_11_activity_logs_admin_only.verification: Activity Logs page accessible via sidebar menu for admin. Endpoint requires admin role (returns 401/403 without auth).

feature_12_logs_columns.verification: Logs table shows: Data/Hora, Usuário, Função (role badge), Ação (action badge), Detalhes. 23 log entries visible.

feature_13_export_csv.verification: Export CSV button present and enabled. Backend endpoint /api/activity-logs/export returns all logs for CSV generation.

backend_tests_summary.TestConstantsEndpoints: 4/4 passed - status-escolaridade, status-licenca, postos-promocao, postos-sem-promocao endpoints
backend_tests_summary.TestMemberNewFields: 3/3 passed - create with new fields, default status_licenca, update new fields
backend_tests_summary.TestMemberFilters: 4/4 passed - filter by unidade, status_licenca, ano_incorporacao, alphabetical sorting
backend_tests_summary.TestActivityLogs: 5/5 passed - endpoint, filter by action, export, admin only, login creates log
